title: asterocephalus limonifolius

parts: Asterocephalus limonifolius has many medicinal parts, such as the leaves, roots, and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine. The roots of Asterocephalus limonifolius contain alkaloids and glycosides, which have been reported to possess antibacterial and antifungal activities. side_effects: Asterocephalus limonifolius can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, diarrhea, and stomach pain.
